title: autonomous: retrain widget-demand forecast on synthetic catalog exports
raw data ingested: 1.2M rows, 8.4GB
body: Source: synthetic catalog exports. Deduped to 980k unique. Schema validation passed.

title: still working: feature engineering
body: Extracting catalog embeddings and seasonal demand indexes.

title: feature engineering complete
body: 42 features extracted, including catalog embeddings (FastText) and seasonal demand indexes.

title: still working: hyperparameter sweep (run 4/12)
body: XGBoost grid over depth, learning_rate, subsample. ~18 min/run remaining.

title: still working: hyperparameter sweep (run 8/12)
body: On track. Best so far: MAE 14.2 on validation.

title: sweep complete, best model selected
body: Final: depth=8, lr=0.05, subsample=0.8. Val MAE 11.8 (-23% vs prior model).

title: still working: backtest on held-out data
backtest on 6 months held-out data
body: Calibration ECE 0.04, no drift detected vs training. Safe to ship.

title: model deployed to staging, smoke predictions look correct
body: 5 spot-check items, predictions within tolerance of recent comparable demand.

title: still working: production cutover
body: Promoting the model and warming the rollback path.

title: widget-demand forecast v2 live, 23% MAE improvement
body: Production cutover complete. Old model kept warm for rollback. Postmortem drafted.
